query: Tucker Carlson new third party FEC Form 1 Statement of Organization filing July August 2026 status
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the bottom line:

**No FEC Form 1 (Statement of Organization) has been filed for a Tucker Carlson third party as of July 12, 2026.** His involvement remains a publicly stated *intent* only, announced in a Columbia Journalism Review interview published July 1, 2026 ("I'm going to help build a third party"). A direct search of the FEC committee database returned no committee associated with Tucker Carlson — all "Carlson" committees relate to unrelated candidates and PACs. There is no party name, treasurer, launch date, or organizational structure on record, and news coverage frames the effort as aspirational rhetoric rather than a registered entity.

The July–August 2026 window specified in the question is largely prospective as of the research date — nothing has been filed yet, and I found no concrete organizational steps beyond the initial announcement.

sources.title: Tucker Carlson Is Starting a Third Party. Those Who've Tried Say: Good Luck!
sources.snippet: Carlson said he wants to help create a third party; no formal FEC registration or party name mentioned; Forward Party CEO cautions about state-by-state regulatory hurdles.

sources.title: Tucker Carlson vows to build a third party. Is the GOP in trouble?
sources.snippet: Carlson said 'I'm going to help build a third party'; no evidence of formal FEC filings or Statement of Organization; announcement of intent rather than established organization.

sources.title: OpenFEC committee name search (query: carlson)
sources.snippet: No committee associated with Tucker Carlson or a new third party; all 'Carlson' committees relate to unrelated candidates and PACs.

sources.title: Browse Committees - FEC.gov
sources.snippet: No committees associated with Tucker Carlson or a third party he is forming are listed.

sources.title: Tucker Carlson Floats Idea of New Political Party Amid Split From Trump
sources.snippet: Carlson floated the idea of creating a new political party amid his rift with Trump and the MAGA coalition.

sources.title: Tucker Carlson teases third political party: 'I'm going to do everything I can to bring that about'
sources.snippet: Carlson teases a third political party as intent, not an established entity.

sources.title: Registering a committee - FEC.gov
sources.snippet: Committees register using the Statement of Organization, Form 1, which must be filed within 10 days of designation/threshold.
